---
title: java
---

```{r knitr_config, include=FALSE}
source("_knitr_config.R")
```

******************************************************************************************

#### weblinks

******************************************************************************************

#### install


```sh
# install
brew tap caskroom/versions
brew cask install java8

# check version
java -version
which java
```


******************************************************************************************

#### R

```r
install.packages("rJava")
```

```sh
# reconfigue Java
R CMD javareconf # need to restart RStudio after this has run
```
